title: narcissus × albidus subsp. tananicus
intro: Narcissus × albidus subsp. tananicus, also known as the Tanacetum or White Daffodil, is a hybrid plant species in the Amaryllidaceae family. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Narcissus × albidus subsp. tananicus, such as infusions, tinctures, and poultices, have been traditionally used for their medicinal purposes.
